## Checklist

- [ ] Copied a template from `src/content/sightings/djungelorm/example-*.md` and **renamed** it (if adding a sighting)
- [ ] Filename starts with `mediaType` and matches [naming convention](CONTRIBUTING.md#file-naming) (e.g. `movie-saw-2004.md`, `tv-show-s02e01.md`)
- [ ] TV entries include required `season` and `episode` in frontmatter and filename
- [ ] Sighting `.md` is under `src/content/sightings/<plush-id>/` and matches the `plush` frontmatter field
- [ ] Screenshot added under that folder's `images/` directory (if applicable)
- [ ] `plush` id matches an entry in `src/plushes.ts`
- [ ] Ran `npm run check` locally
